# Okta Vendor Summary

**Last reviewed:** 2024-09-30  
**Finance contact:** Diego Castillo  
**Classification:** Confidential

## Contract Overview

- **Products:** Workforce Identity Cloud (WIC), Okta Privileged Access (OPA)
- **Licensed users:** 3,100
- **Annual contract value (ACV):** $372,000
- **Contract start / end:** 2023-11-01 / 2026-10-31
- **Renewal cadence:** 3-year term, currently in year 2

## Spend by Module

| Module | Users | Annual Cost |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| Single Sign-On | 3,100 | $155,000 |
| Multi-Factor Auth | 3,100 | $93,000 |
| Lifecycle Management | 2,800 | $84,000 |
| Okta Privileged Access | 410 | $40,000 |

## Utilization

MFA enrollment is at 94% — the remaining 6% are contractor accounts that IT is working to migrate to a separate contractor-tier license (cheaper). That change alone should reduce ACV by ~$9,000 at next true-up.

## Vendor Sentiment

Okta support quality declined in 2023 following their restructuring, then improved noticeably in mid-2024. Current CSAT from IT Ops: 3.9 / 5. Still below the 4.2 threshold we set as a re-evaluation trigger.

## Security Incidents

Okta's October 2023 support system breach required us to rotate 17 admin credentials. No customer data impact confirmed, but the incident has been logged as a vendor risk event. See `security/vendor-incidents/okta-2023.md`.

## Upcoming Actions

- True-up review: 2025-03-15
- Evaluate Okta Identity Governance add-on (quoted at +$62,000/yr) — competing with in-house solution proposal from IT
- Benchmark against Microsoft Entra ID pricing during 2026 renewal prep
